title: Ripple Cups Disposable Coffee Cups 12OZ with Lids for Hot & Cold Drinks Premium Triple Walled, Recyclable Paper Cups, Leak-Proof & Odorless for Home, Cafe, Parties, Outdoor Use (6 Pack)

☕Environmentally-Friendly Material: We are committed to offering an eco-friendly sustainable alternative to single-use plastic. Play your part for a greener world with our food-grade, reusable and odour-free biodegradable cups they come in handy for travel, party, picnics, parties and even for ping pong ball games

description: Our ZALE YARDLEY triple wall ripple effect 12oz cups with lids are ideal to keep drinks hot without burning your fingers thick double-walled design keeps your drink warm while protecting your hands, eliminating the need for flimsy coffee sleeves. Keep messy leaks and spills from ruining your morning. Our convenient, Snap-On lids allow you to enjoy your coffee on the go. Save time washing dishes. Our cups are perfect for on-the-go use, parties, coffee shops, and more. And because they are sustainable, you can use them guilt-free.
